info.title: SHEES API
info.description: Safety, Health, Environment & Emergency System - RESTful API for incident management, training, inspections, and worker tracking.

get.description: Returns dashboard widgets based on authenticated user's role and permissions. Requires Sanctum bearer token from login response dashboard_token.

post.description: Revokes the currently authenticated Sanctum dashboard token.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Filter incidents with datetime greater than or equal to this value

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Filter incidents with datetime less than or equal to this value

notes.example: Server and client differ on response value

comment.example: Please clarify the sequence of events.

example.events: Forklift reversed into stacked materials while repositioning a pallet.

example.action_taken: Isolated the area and stopped forklift operation.
Replace damaged guard and refresh reversing-zone controls.

example.events: Forklift reversed into stacked materials while repositioning a pallet.

example.action_taken: Isolated the area and stopped forklift operation.
Replace damaged guard and refresh reversing-zone controls.

example.events: Forklift reversed into stacked materials while repositioning a pallet.

example.action_taken: Isolated the area and stopped forklift operation.
Replace damaged guard and refresh reversing-zone controls.

bearer_token.description: Bearer token auth. Use data.dashboard_token (Sanctum) for /api/dashboard endpoints, and data.token for mobile token middleware endpoints.
bearer_token.name: bearer_token

tags.name: Inspection Mobile
tags.description: Inspection-focused mobile authentication, run execution, and sync endpoints
